context: Evaluates the agent's ability to detect an unparseable file and ask the user for structure clarification.

checklist.name: Detects unparseable structure
checklist.description: The agent recognizes the file has no headings, bullets, or numbered list structure

checklist.name: Does not guess incorrectly
checklist.description: The agent does NOT arbitrarily split the content without asking

checklist.name: Asks user for delimiter
checklist.description: The agent explicitly asks the user how standards are delimited before proceeding
